data_source_note: GitHub Discussions API not available via MCP tools; analysis derived from Issues labeled 'discussion' as proxy

high_engagement_issues.signal: High community interest in MCPB/DXT support

emerging_themes: MCPB/DXT file format support — multiple related issues
Model capability flags and reasoning effort configuration
Windows-specific UX issues (scrollbar width, emoji rendering)

answered_rate_estimate.note: Cannot compute precisely without Discussions API; estimating from issues with assignees or label changes
answered_rate_estimate.issues_with_assignees: Low — most issues lack assignees in sample

top_contributors_in_discussions.note: Based on PR and issue activity as proxy for discussion engagement

recommendations: Enable GitHub Discussions API access to get direct discussion metrics
Create FAQ pinned discussion for MCPB/DXT import issues (high traffic)
Add 'good first issue' labels to help wanted issues to attract contributors
Consider monthly community call to address trending themes
